inputs.label: Current Blood Glucose
inputs.businessContext: Measured blood glucose level prior to meal

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured blood glucose level prior to meal
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yemek öncesi ölçülen kan şekeri seviyesi
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de glucosa en sangre medido antes de la comida
businessContext_i18n.ar: مستوى السكر في الدم المقاس قبل الوجبة

inputs.label: Target Blood Glucose
inputs.businessContext: Desired blood glucose level after insulin

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired blood glucose level after insulin
businessContext_i18n.tr: İnsülin sonrası hedeflenen kan şekeri seviyesi
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de glucosa en sangre deseado después de la insulina
businessContext_i18n.ar: مستوى السكر في الدم المطلوب بعد الأنسولين

inputs.label: Insulin Sensitivity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Drop in blood glucose per unit of rapid-acting insulin

label_i18n.es: Factor de sensibilidad a la insulina

businessContext_i18n.en: Drop in blood glucose per unit of rapid-acting insulin
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim hızlı etkili insülin başına kan şekerindeki düşüş
businessContext_i18n.fr: Baisse de la glycémie par unité d'insuline rapide
businessContext_i18n.es: Descenso de glucosa en sangre por unidad de insulina rápida
businessContext_i18n.ar: انخفاض السكر في الدم لكل وحدة من الأنسولين سريع المفعول

inputs.label: Carbohydrate Intake
inputs.businessContext: Grams of carbohydrates planned to be consumed

businessContext_i18n.en: Grams of carbohydrates planned to be consumed
businessContext_i18n.fr: Grammes de glucides prévus pour la consommation
businessContext_i18n.es: Gramos de carbohidratos planificados para consumir

inputs.label: Insulin-to-Carb Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Grams of carbohydrates covered by 1 unit of insulin

businessContext_i18n.en: Grams of carbohydrates covered by 1 unit of insulin
businessContext_i18n.de: Gramm Kohlenhydrate, die von 1 Einheit Insulin abgedeckt werden
businessContext_i18n.fr: Grammes de glucides couverts par 1 unité d'insuline
businessContext_i18n.es: Gramos de carbohidratos cubiertos por 1 unidad de insulina
businessContext_i18n.ar: جرامات الكربوهيدرات التي تغطيها وحدة واحدة من الأنسولين

inputs.label: Active Insulin On Board
inputs.businessContext: Units of insulin still active from previous boluses

businessContext_i18n.en: Units of insulin still active from previous boluses
businessContext_i18n.tr: Önceki boluslardan hala aktif olan insülin ünitesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Noch aktive Insulineinheiten von früheren Boli
businessContext_i18n.fr: Unités d'insuline encore actives des bolus précédents
businessContext_i18n.es: Unidades de insulina aún activas de bolos anteriores
businessContext_i18n.ar: وحدات الأنسولين التي لا تزال نشطة من الجرعات السابقة

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.

rules.message: Blood glucose must be between 20 and 600 mg/dL
Target glucose must be between 70 and 180 mg/dL
